sentences.arabic: كَانَ حَمَدٌ يَعْمَلُ وَيَتَعَبُ لِيُطْعِمَ عَائِلَتَهُ.
sentences.translation: Hamad je radio i naprezao se da prehrani porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: Hamad worked and toiled to feed his family.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ دَائِمًا أَمِينًا فِي عَمَلِهِ وَلَا يَكْذِبُ.
sentences.translation: Uvijek je bio pošten u poslu i nije lagao.
sentences.translationEn: He was always trustworthy in his work and did not lie.

sentences.translation: Vjeruje da je dobro djelo ibadeta.
sentences.translationEn: He believes that good work is worship.

sentences.translation: Kaže: Radim i oslanjam se na Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: He says: I work and put my trust in God.
